author: va8e
content: Result: Workspace conversion complete. Root Cargo.toml is now workspace with two members: crates/crossbridge (CLI binary) and crates/crossbridge-protocol (shared protocol crate). Protocol crate has postcard message types (Message, Request, Response, StatusUpdate, Status, Priority) and length-prefixed framing helpers (encode_frame, decode_frame, decode_all_frames). All 24 tests pass, clean compile with no warnings. default.nix updated with cargoBuildFlags for workspace.
